description_long: This flute features a unique design with a spherical central body reminiscent of a Poké Ball, split into red and white hemispheres with a black band and a small circular button at the center. The main tube of the flute is a light tan color, adorned with red accent rings and four evenly spaced finger holes. The mouthpiece is cylindrical and extends from the white hemisphere, while the opposite end tapers to a rounded point. The flute's construction appears to be primarily from a lightweight, wood-like material, with the spherical section possibly made from painted plastic or resin. The overall appearance is playful and modern, blending traditional flute elements with a pop-culture inspired motif.
description: A tan flute with a spherical red-and-white Poké Ball-inspired body, red accent rings, and four finger holes along the tube.
description_view_0: The flute's spherical red-and-white body and tan tube with finger holes are clearly visible, showing the playful design.
description_view_1: The view highlights the end of the flute's tube and the back of the spherical body, with the mouthpiece less visible.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the length of the tan tube and the rounded end, with the spherical body partially obscured.
description_view_3: The flute's full length and the division of the spherical body into red and white halves are prominent, with the mouthpiece visible.
